Localization.Description: Access to file cache_credentials containing domain users' cached credentials

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user with ID {subject.account.id} started utility {subject.process.name} and accessed file {object.name} containing domain users' cached credentials on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started utility {subject.process.name} and accessed file {object.name} containing domain users' cached credentials on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to access file {object.name} containing domain users' cached credentials on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to access file {object.name} containing domain users' cached credentials on host {event_src.host}
